query: Palworld 1.0 raid events waves bribe mechanics adjustments

mako.raw:
{"query":"Palworld 1.0 raid events waves bribe mechanics adjustments","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1654,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/everything-new-in-palworld-1-0/","title":"Everything New In Palworld 1.0 - New Pals, Mechanics, Tools, And More - GameSpot","content":"4 days ago — The raid system has been overhauled into a wave-based system. Enemies will come in waves, and you'll receive rewards for defeating all waves.Read more
The player level cap has been increased from 65 to 80.
This new mechanic allows you to strengthen your Pals.
A negotiator may visit your base.
They have the power to cancel raids if you pay them gold coins.
Each Pal has its own individuality more clearly conveyed through sound.
You can read the full patch notes on the Palworld Steam page."},{"url":"https://palworld.fandom.com/wiki/Version_1.0","title":"Version 1.0 | Palworld Wiki | Fandom","content":"8 days ago — The base raid system has been significantly overhauled and reworked into a wave-based system. Enemies will now attack in successive waves, and ...
This version of Palworld was released on the 10th of July 2026.
- To maintain fairness following the reward adjustments, main mission and sub-mission progress have been reset.
- Lamball's Fluffy Shield now has a wider defense range, making it easier to block attacks.
Enemies will now attack in successive waves, and players will receive rewards upon defeating all waves.
- The types of enemies that raid your base now vary depending on the environment.
- - For example, the Free Pal Alliance will attack in Crescent Moon Shore, while the Eternal Pyre Faction will raid Mount Obsidian.
By paying gold coins, you can prevent an upcoming raid from occurring.
- The chance of catching Alpha Pals from fishing ponds has been increased.
- Crafting for Simple Bait will now be unlocked when Intermediate or Advanced Fishing Rods are unlocked through Technology."},{"url":"https://zap-hosting.com/en/blog/2026/07/palworld-1-0-every-new-feature-region-system-explained/","title":"Palworld 1.0: Every New Feature, Region & System Explained - Zap-Hosting","content":"8 days ago — Pals repair without items Wave-based raid system Enemies attack in waves — rewards after clearing all waves Defense structures no longer ...
The update is free for all owners, the base price was not raised, and Palworld launched simultaneously on Steam, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, and Game Pass.
Note: Palworld is 30 % off on Steam until 23rd July 2026 (approx. $20.99 instead of $29.99).
The World Tree, visible on the horizon since Early Access, is finally enterable — after defeating all eight original Tower Bosses.
Lovander is now Dark-type (was Normal)
Palworld 1.0 is not a content patch — it is the game Pocketpair has been building toward since the Early Access hype.
Patch notes based on update 1.100.427 from 10th July 2026."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/wikis/palworld/Palworld_1.0_Details_and_Patch_Notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 Details and Patch Notes - Palworld Guide - IGN","content":"Version 1.0 of Palworld has arrived, bringing with it an official full release, tonnes of new content, adjustments and fixes, and much more!
The new Mutation mechanic has been added, which gives breeding a low chance of producing a Pal stronger than the normal breeding result.
This effect stacks up to 30 times with itself.
Jetragon's Aerial Missile has had its power increased and cooldown shortened.
Overall pricing has been adjusted based on Pal stats.
Adjusted the balance of Pal Labor Research Laboratory and added new levels and effects to various research categories.
If a Gold Coin Assembly Line is present at the base, a dedicated raid event will now occur.
When placing a Pal Disassembly Conveyor, you can now preview the position of its item output."},{"url":"https://xgamingserver.com/blog/palworld-1-0-raids-base-defense/","title":"Palworld 1.0 Raids: New Wave-Based Base Defense Guide","date":"8 days ago","content":"8 days ago — Raids are now wave-based: enemies attack in successive waves and you get rewards for clearing them all. Defense structures no longer use ammo, ...Read more"}]}

Enemies attack in successive waves, and you earn rewards for clearing all","score":0.6426349,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://palworld.fandom.com/wiki/Version_1.0","title":"Version 1.0 - Palworld Wiki - Fandom","content":"With the release of *Palworld*, a lot of information here may no longer be relevant and needs updating. Please feel free to jump in and help out! Sunreach introduces a wide range of new content, including new Pals, tower bosses, and ores that can only be mined using specialized equipment. The key to the story of Palworld is the **World Tree**, towering over Palpagos, and it is here that players will face their greatest challenge yet. In addition, enemy bases have been added at sea, further expanding the stage for exploration and combat. Many new technologies related to the ancient civilization have been added. New NPCs and Journals have also been added across the world, letting you learn more about the world of Palworld through exploration. Additionally, we've made numerous adjustments to make it easier to include a wider variety of Pals in your team and allow them to play a more active role.","score":0.51735204,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MEOi6-pej90","title":"Palworld: Huge Raid Meta Changes | Tides of Terraria","content":"The new meta for raiding is that we are no longer going to be using rescue pals instead we are going to be spamming like you just accept that you're going to die.","score":0.31513548,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h8YTcwsIfsk","title":"Daily Palworld Raids Until The 1.0 Update: Day 2","content":"In this Palworld series I am taking on Palworld Raids every day until Palworld 1.0. We will use armies that we've acquired through breeding,","score":0.2973837,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6_Z0K5NlUcU&vl=en","title":"Palworld 1.0 Raid System & Counters","content":"A video discussing potential pal counters for raid boss types depending on element and whether or not the raid system is overhauled.","score":0.2410831,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.7,"request_id":"3a51e4da-5b73-4f6d-8b74-9383347ac288"}
